{"tool":"appliedDiff","path":"backend/app/main.py","diff":"@@ -19,6 +19,50 @@
 from fastapi.responses import FileResponse
 import os
 
+async def broadcast_ws():
+    """Push latest machine data to all WebSocket clients immediately."""
+    if not active_connections:
+        return
+    db = database.SessionLocal()
+    try:
+        machines = db.query(models.Machine).all()
+        data = []
+        for m in machines:
+            remaining = max(0.0, m.initial_asnova_length - (m.current_total_meters - m.meters_at_fill))
+            now = datetime.utcnow()
+            is_esp_online = m.last_seen and (now - m.last_seen).total_seconds() < 60
+            if not is_esp_online:
+                status = "OFFLINE"
+            elif m.current_baud == 0:
+                status = "ESP_ONLINE_NO_SIGNAL"
+            elif remaining <= 0:
+                status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
+            else:
+                status = "RUNNING"
+            data.append({
+                "id": m.id, "status": status,
+                "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2),
+                "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),

22→async def broadcast_ws():
23→    """Push latest machine data to all WebSocket clients immediately."""
24→    if not active_connections:
25→        return
26→    db = database.SessionLocal()
27→    try:
28→        machines = db.query(models.Machine).all()
29→        data = []
30→        for m in machines:
31→            remaining = max(0.0, m.initial_asnova_length - (m.current_total_meters - m.meters_at_fill))
32→            now = datetime.utcnow()
33→            is_esp_online = m.last_seen and (now - m.last_seen).total_seconds() < 60
34→            if not is_esp_online:
35→                status = "OFFLINE"
36→            elif m.current_baud == 0:
37→                status = "ESP_ONLINE_NO_SIGNAL"
38→            elif remaining <= 0:
39→                status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
40→            else:
41→                status = "RUNNING"
42→            data.append({
43→                "id": m.id, "status": status,
44→                "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2),
45→                "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),
46→                "remaining": round(remaining, 2),
47→                "baud": m.current_baud, "protocol": m.current_protocol,
48→                "connection_source": m.connection_source,
49→                "preferred_source": m.preferred_source,
50→                "sys_info": {
51→                    "ram": {"free": m.esp_free_ram, "total": m.esp_total_ram},
52→                    "rom": {"free": m.esp_free_rom, "total": m.esp_total_rom},
53→                    "cpu": m.esp_cpu_freq,
54→                    "wifi": {"ssid": m.esp_wifi_ssid, "rssi": m.esp_wifi_rssi}
55→                }
56→            })
57→        msg = json.dumps(data)
58→        for ws in list(active_connections):
59→            try:
60→                await ws.send_text(msg)
61→            except:
62→                active_connections.remove(ws)
63→    finally:
64→        db.close()
65→

+import websockets
+import json
+

+    uri = "ws://localhost:8000/ws/machines"

+        print(f"First machine: {data[0]}")
+
+asyncio.run(test())

+from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Enum, Boolean
+from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
+from .database import Base
+import datetime
+import enum
+
+class UserRole(str, enum.Enum):
+    ADMIN = "ADMIN"
+    MASTER = "MASTER"
+    NAZORATCHI = "NAZORATCHI"
+    MECHANIC = "MECHANIC"
+
+class User(Base):
+    __tablename__ = "users"
+    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
+    username = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
+    password_hash = Column(String)
+    full_name = Column(String)
+    role = Column(Enum(UserRole), default=UserRole.MASTER)
+    is_active = Column(Integer, default=1)
+
+class Category(Base):
+    __tablename__ = "categories"
+    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
+    name = Column(String, unique=True)
+
+class Machine(Base):
+    __tablename__ = "machines"
+    id = Column(String, primary_key=True, index=True)
+    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("categories.id"))
+    status = Column(String, default="STOPPED")
+    
+    initial_asnova_length = Column(Float, default=0.0)
+    meters_at_fill = Column(Float, default=0.0)
+    current_total_meters = Column(Float, default=0.0)
+    shift_meters = Column(Float, default=0.0)
+    
+    current_baud = Column(Integer, default=0)
+    current_protocol = Column(String, default="UNKNOWN")
+    last_seen = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
+    
+    esp_free_ram = Column(Integer, default=0)
+    esp_total_ram = Column(Integer, default=0)
+    esp_free_rom = Column(Integer, default=0)
+    esp_total_rom = Column(Integer, default=0)
+    esp_cpu_freq = Column(Integer, default=0)
+    esp_wifi_ssid = Column(String, default="")
